_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Elite Golf Greens
project.address: Plot No. SC-01/D4, Sector 79, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305
project.tagline: Replenish the Luxuries of a Golf Resort
project.description: Ready-to-move-in luxury residential development in Sector 79 featuring spacious corner flats, Vastu-compliant structures, and rich golf resort amenities.
project.long_description: Elite Golf Greens is a premium residential community spread over 6.18 acres in Noida's Sector 79. Developed by Elite Group (Golfgreen Mansions Pvt Ltd), the project comprises 8 towers of G+19 floors with 616 units. The homes are beautifully planned as all-corner apartments, ensuring abundant natural light, privacy, and outstanding ventilation. Residents enjoy luxurious thematic lifestyle amenities like reflexology parks, skating rinks, cricket pitches, and private lounge areas, all wrapped in a tranquil microclimate overlooking the sports city landscapes. Completed and delivered on-schedule, this society offers zero delivery risk and active flat registries.

builder.name: Elite Group
builder.company_overview: Elite Group is a highly acclaimed, mid-size premium residential developer in Noida. Known for structural reliability, timely completions, and strong financial health, the builder specializes in low-density, thematic vertical communities. Their flagship project, Elite Golf Greens, highlights their commitment to executing pristine landscaped environments and high-end construction standards.
awards: Times Realty Best Premium Project NCR

connectivity.notes: India's first Vedic thematic theme park

assumptions: Ready-to-move-in status with CC/OC implies 0% GST applies.
Resale transactions subject to AOA transfer fee guidelines.

payment_plan.notes: Standard bi-partite registry escrow payment timeline.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Elite Golf Greens represents an outstanding ready-to-move-in lifestyle choice in Sector 79, Noida, combining 100% corner-flat ventilation layouts with verified legal compliance and deep sports-centric infrastructure.
why_buy: Superior Spatial Flow: 100% all-corner flat layouts ensure outstanding cross ventilation and zero dark corridors.
Strong Builder Safety: Sanjeev Group (Elite) has a zero-litigation record and delivered this project with zero delays.
Excellent Microclimate: Large central park, reflexology walkways, and vast green belts ensure low noise and clean air.
why_avoid: Premium Pricing Scale: Higher super-to-carpet layout loading limits absolute square footage efficiency.
Underdeveloped Commercial Retail: Society retail arcade is compact; major multiplex visits require driving 2 km.
decision_profile.best_for: Upgrader families looking for delivered, Vastu-compliant homes in Noida with peaceful, green resort-style setups.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term traders or buyers looking for compact entry units under ₹1.5 Crore.

buyerPersonas.headline: Upgrade to Resort Wellness
reasons: Exquisite corner ventilation with Vastu structures.
Direct botanical vistas over Ved Van Park corridors.

persona_profile.income_range: Rs 2.5 Lakhs - Rs 4 Lakhs per month
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirations for safe, healthy, low-density green resort surroundings with zero legal hassle.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Elite Golf Greens stands out as one of the best and safest premium end-user choices in Sector 79. Its exceptional corner layout design and solid developer track record justify the premium resale prices.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For families looking for immediate occupation, the spacious, sun-lit, and well-ventilated corner flats offer a refreshing and premium living experience, close to Noida's thematic parks.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A stable capital-preservation wealth asset. Expect steady 6-8% annual capital growth driven by Sector 79's maturation into a luxury Sports City corridor.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Exceptional. Kids and seniors benefit from safe on-ground layouts, reflexology tracks, and proximity to Noida's premier Vedic theme park (Ved Van).
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Low cash yield (around 3%) but highly liquid secondary market. Clean legal titles make resale exits extremely prompt.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Excellent. Elegant drop-off lobbies, smart vertical landscaping, Otis high-speed lifts, and premium corner flat aesthetics.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Extremely low risk profile. CC/OC is fully received, no pending builder dues, and registrations are completely active.
walk_away_conditions: Buyers looking for maximum carpet area per super area (due to premium resort loading).
negotiation_leverage: Can use the lower entry rates of neighboring Mahagun Mirabella to squeeze pricing with motivated sellers.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect time to acquire. Sector 79 has matured fully and ready inventory is shrinking. Aim for units below ₹15,500/sqft.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Superior resort-themed landscaping, larger open spaces, and lower density.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Stunning neo-classical Roman architecture, slightly larger balcony configurations, and lower entry pricing.
competitors.verdict: Elite Golf Greens wins on ventilation layout and builder delivery score; Mahagun Mirabella wins on aesthetic grandeur and entry cost.
competitors.price_delta_note: Elite Golf Greens is ₹500/sqft more expensive than Mirabella.
